ai.title: Chat with Bob
ai.grounded: Grounded on Business Memory · never invents data
ai.empty: Ask Bob anything about your business — approved records only.

audio.notConfigured: Audio is not configured yet. Please try again later.
audio.unsupportedPidgin: Audio for Nigerian Pidgin is not available yet. You can continue reading the text response.
audio.unsupportedLanguage: Audio is not available for this language yet.
audio.generationFailed: FreBob could not create the audio right now. You can continue reading the text.
audio.networkError: Audio could not be loaded. Check your connection and try again.
audio.voiceUnavailable: This voice is temporarily unavailable. Choose another voice or try again.
audio.textTooLong: This content will be played in separate parts.
audio.noText: There is no text available to read aloud.
audio.disclosure: Audio is generated using YarnGPT. The text selected for playback is securely sent to the audio service to create speech.

language.fallbackNotice: This text is not yet available in your selected language. The English version is shown instead.

empty.title: No products match
empty.description: Try clearing your search or filter, or add a new product.

errors.generic: Something didn't work. Please try again.
